1.name: Ashley
1.speaking_style: Speak warmly and naturally, like a busy Ohio suburban mom giving an honest recommendation to a friend.
1.sample_text: Honestly, I just needed something that works without breaking the bank for the whole family.

2.name: Dorothy
2.speaking_style: Speak calmly and steadily, in a slightly slower pace, like a 68-year-old retired nurse from Phoenix sharing wisdom.
2.sample_text: After forty years as a nurse, I know which routines stick. This one stuck.

3.name: Ethan
3.speaking_style: Speak in a measured, thoughtful tone, like a 38-year-old eco-conscious Portland dad explaining a deliberate choice.
3.sample_text: I dug into the materials, the lifecycle data, and the company behind it before I bought.

4.name: Jordan
4.speaking_style: Speak with energy and a casual, friendly cadence, like a 26-year-old Austin athlete sharing a fitness insight.
4.sample_text: Real talk — my Oura data showed my recovery was off, and gum health was the missing link.

5.name: Linda
5.speaking_style: Speak with calm authority and warmth, like a 58-year-old Black woman from Houston managing her health with intention.
5.sample_text: When my doctor said gum disease and diabetes work together, I had to do something about it.

6.name: Marcus
6.speaking_style: Speak with composed authority, like a polished 52-year-old corporate executive from Atlanta — confident but never showy.
6.sample_text: When I commit to a daily ritual, the tool needs to match the standard. This one does.

7.name: Priya
7.speaking_style: Speak with gentle clarity, like a 31-year-old first-time pregnant Seattle professional being careful and informed.
7.sample_text: I asked my OB what was safe during pregnancy — she pointed me here, and the bleeding stopped within a week.

8.name: Raymond
8.speaking_style: Speak deliberately and steadily, in a slightly lower register, like a 61-year-old Minneapolis heart-attack survivor with calm resolve.
8.sample_text: Heart attack at fifty-nine changed everything. Now I take every part of my health seriously, including this.

9.name: Sophia
9.speaking_style: Speak with polished, articulate clarity, like a 45-year-old Latina professional from Chicago in Invisalign treatment, image-aware and precise.
9.sample_text: Mid-Invisalign, I needed something that cleans around the aligners without scratching them. This was it.

10.name: Tyler
10.speaking_style: Speak with relaxed millennial casualness, like a 22-year-old Nashville college senior who isn't trying to sell anything.
10.sample_text: Bought this because it was on sale, kept using it because it actually works. That's the whole story.
